steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage focuses on what the Aspera mission will achieve: using a new telescope to observe warm-hot CGM gas that “haven't previously been observable,” which is crucial to understanding galaxy evolution.

steps.title: Match the answer to the signal
steps.content: Choice D states that Aspera will produce “the first direct observations” of warm-hot CGM gas, which “likely has an important role in the evolution of galaxies.” This directly reflects the passage's focus on a mission delivering a new observation of previously-invisible material critical to galaxy evolution. The other choices either focus on a person (A), describe only the current limitation (B), or generalize about incomplete understanding without the Aspera mission (C). That matches choice D — D is correct.
